title: batch
description:
Enables the ability to asynchronously "batch" the request, supporting a long-running request up to 10 minutes. Upon requesting batch=Y, the service will respond back with an HTTP Status Code of 202. Once a batch request is submitted, use the `batch/v1/status` to see if the job has completed. Once completed, retrieve the results of the request via `batch/v1/result`.

**Additional Access Required. To gain access to this feature, reach out to your FactSet Account team or "Report Issue" above and our support teams can assist.** Upon requesting "batch": "Y", the service will respond back with an HTTP Status Code of 202.
